docs.title: Homelab
docs.text: Media and home server stack. It's a docker-compose project built around Plex, including schedulers/orchestrators for TV / Movie downloads, an always behind VPN torrenting webserver, and a site for users to request new downloads. SSL and a GoogleOAuth whitelist are built in as well.

docs.title: Installation
docs.text:
Clone the repo locally

git clone https://github.com/juftin/homelab.git
cd homelab

Install the accompanying Python CLI

pipx install git+https://github.com/juftin/homelab.git@main

or

pipx install ../homelab/
